title: EvidenceIngestionStatus
description: Status payload returned by GET /api/evidence/{correlationId}/status and delivered to callbackUrl webhooks.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the ingestion job reached a terminal state (COMPLETE, FAILED, or REJECTED); null while still in progress.

itemResults.description: Per-document processing results. Populated once status reaches COMPLETE, FAILED, or REJECTED.

errors.description: Validation or processing errors. Non-empty when status is FAILED or REJECTED.

metadata.description: Metadata echoed from the originating request.

webhookAttempt.description: Present only in webhook deliveries. Indicates the 1-based delivery attempt number (max 5, with exponential back-off).
